1786540.name: NEKO COMMANDO
1786540.description:
NEKO COMMANDO is an Anime MMOFPS that features the ability to switch between Ranged and Melee. In ranged form you have a vast assortment of weapons at your disposal, giving you an advantage at a distance. Melee form has no ranged attacks but is faster, stronger, and more robust.



The ability to switch between Ranged and Melee form at any time adds an element of strategy. Players never need worry about running out of ammunition because Nekos have their own distinct advantages – such as running on walls then dropping onto enemies unexpectedly. In certain modes, players can even harness special Neko mutations, such as Ghost Nekos, which can turn invisible.



Variety is the spice of life; NEKO COMMANDO has several addictive game modes to choose from. Just want to engage in an all-out no-holds-barred melee? Fire up a traditional Deathmatch. Interested in joining forces with other players to wage a more cerebral, tactical battle? Try Conquest mode, in which players to work as a team to capture as many bases as possible, or Destruction mode, in which one team tries to demolish the other team's base. NEKO COMMANDO also features a large selection of weapons players can acquire as they progress through the game.*



Features
  • Fast-paced , up to 16 Players per Lobby
  • Transform into Melee-form for close-combat
  • Interesting maps in different sizes
  • Fun game modes as Deathmatch, Destruction, and Conquest
1786540.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
